title: Unpacking what we know about the new Trump Gold Card program | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Unpacking what we know about the new Trump Gold Card program

#### LinkedIn Live // December 17, 2025
Watch our LinkedIn Live recording exploring what we know about the new exclusive pathway to U.S. permanent residence — the Trump Gold Card program.
In this recorded session, BAL immigration experts Michelle Gergerian and Kristi Ngo break down major developments in U.S. immigration policy, focusing on President Trump’s Executive Order 14351 and the launch of the Trump Gold Card program.
- Eligibility and costs : What qualifies as a “significant financial gift” and the required contributions for individuals and corporations.
- Program logistics : Timelines, application requirements and vetting processes.
- Global context : How the Trump Gold Card compares to other similar visas worldwide.
- Alternatives : Why the EB-5 Immigrant Investor Program remains a viable option.
BAL’s Gold Card practice group is already advising clients on strategies to navigate this new program and leverage opportunities for permanent residency. Contact us to schedule a consultation today.
Watch the full LinkedIn Live event on demand below.

#### Senior Associate // Los Angeles
